sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81452" key="perikaqi/stamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περικαθ-ίσταμαι</orth>, <sense id="n81452.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take up position around, invest</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χωρίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1441.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iamb.Bab.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
